span.p:
System party-purpose branch:
finalStatus=fulfilled
AND purpose=party
AND no prior party_consumption

span.p:
raw_materials.current_stock -= issued
insert inventory_transactions type=party_consumption
audit: requisition.party_consumption

per accepted line:
insert purchases

last_purchase_price/date
inventory_transactions type=purchase
